nasb.text: Jethro rejoiced over all the goodness which the Lord had done to Israel, in delivering them from the hand of the Egyptians.

esv.text: And Jethro rejoiced for all the good that the Lord had done to Israel, in that he had delivered them out of the hand of the Egyptians.

cnv.text: 葉忒羅因為耶和華為以色列人所行的美事，就是拯救他們脫離埃及人的手，就非常喜樂。

ccb.text: 叶忒罗为耶和华恩待以色列人、把他们救出埃及而高兴，
